title: herdr: Is This the Ultimate Agent Multiplexer?
summary: Herdr is a Rust-based terminal multiplexer that runs multiple AI coding agents like Claude Code, OpenCode, and Codex side-by-side in persistent panes and tabs. Built on ratatui without Electron, it provides live status tracking, keyboard-driven navigation, and supports remote orchestration over SSH.
